extraction.one_line_summary: MARINI Nicolás won the opening road stage bunch sprint in wet conditions for Nippo-Vini Fantini after MORFIN Ivan held prologue lead by one second.
tactical_patterns: Nippo-Vini Fantini successfully positioned their sprinter using BONO Matteo as final leadout man in wet opening stage
Damp conditions neutralized pure power sprinters, allowing tactical positioning to determine outcome over raw speed

rider_signals.BONO Matteo: positive: executed crucial final leadout work in wet conditions for winning sprint
